title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models for chat, generate, embeddings and tool use.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-user support, model management, RAG and plugins.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama offering sync/async APIs, streaming, and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama: chat, generate, pull, list, delete models with native streaming.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper for Ollama with conversation history, markdown rendering and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into inline code copilots with autocomplete and explain features.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support, PVC and autoscaling options.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app using ollama-js and Vite, demonstrating streaming chat in the browser.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-to-use Docker Compose stacks bundling Ollama with CPU/GPU variants plus WebUI and Open-WebUI.

title: ollama-hass-addon
summary: Home Assistant add-on that runs Ollama locally and exposes a service for automations and voice assistants.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Simple RAG example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store to chat with local documents.

title: ollama-nim-sdk
summary: Nim language wrapper for Ollama REST API with async HTTP and native streaming support.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET client for Ollama with IAsyncEnumerable streaming and DI-friendly setup.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API with Tokio and streaming.

title: ollama-dlang
summary: D language client for Ollama using std.net.curl and vibe.d for async requests and server-sent events.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for AI-assisted note writing and summarization.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve deployment example scaling Ollama models across multiple GPUs and nodes with autoscaling.
